case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR VS. JOSE ZECENA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZECENA, JOSE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,070.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUENNA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - JUDGMENT.
